# ZutaCore

**Category:** Liquid Cooling, Two-Phase Immersion, Direct-to-Chip Cooling
**Website:** https://zutacore.com/

## Headline
Two-phase direct liquid cooling company relevant to buyers comparing immersion with alternative ultra-dense thermal architectures for AI and HPC clusters.

## Overview
ZutaCore strengthens the cooling graph where buyers need a clearer comparison point between conventional direct-to-chip paths, immersion strategies, and more specialized two-phase thermal architectures.

## Key capabilities
- two-phase liquid cooling
- boiling-assisted heat transfer
- ultra-dense compute cooling architectures

## Best fit for
- hyperscale thermal teams
- advanced compute architects
- programs evaluating extreme-density cooling tradeoffs beyond standard cold-plate paths
